Pending labels still require project-owner approval before promotion-ready status.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Use of Proceeds: build a per-mis-sioned ledger pilot for tokenised voluntary carbon units and grid-integrity data; no public offering of digital assets in the Kingdom and no retail distribution.
Covenants: no minting of new tokens/units outside private permissioned network; no sale of customer meter-level data; immediate notice of any cyber breach; annual third-party assurance on ESG claims.

MAC & Carve-outs: market-wide volatility, changes in public-source ESG benchmarks, or ministerial statements shall not constitute a Material Adverse Change; however, any concealed data breach, regulatory prohibition on private tokenisation, or loss of climate-data rights is a MAC.
no undisclosed cyber incident or ransomware event
immediate notice of any cyber breach
